description: Create Part4_EnergyFramework.mqh - Energy Resolution Framework (EDE + RE + EAE) from Letra 37, plus Wave Intelligence System (belief engine, hypothesis engine, prediction engine, validation engine, adaptive confidence). Also includes the physics observation layer and convexity maturity engine.
steps: Create Part4_EnergyFramework.mqh at the repo root
Port Physics Observation Layer: obs_ExpansionScore, obs_DecayScore, obs_CurvatureScore, obs_AbsorptionScore, obs_LiquidityScore (all 0-100 scores derived from physics primitives)

Port Energy Dissipation Engine (EDE): ede_state (1-6 from canonical phase), ede_expansionEnergy (from obs_ExpansionScore + impulse + efficiency), ede_dissipatedEnergy (accumulates through phases), ede_dissipationProgress (0-100, 25 per phase stage)
Port Resolution Engine (RE): re_expectedCycles, re_completedCycles, re_recursiveCompletionScore, re_residualEnergy, re_resolutionState (RESOLVED/PARTIALLY RESOLVED/UNRESOLVED), re_residualEnergyScore

Port Energy Attractor Engine (EAE): eae_primaryAttractorPrice (from flipzone/origin based on resolution state), eae_primaryAttractorScore (weighted by residual + resolution + distance), eae_energyState
Port Convexity Maturity Engine: expWeaknessScore, inductionMatScore, liqMatScore -> rawConvexityMaturity -> EMA smoothed convexityMaturity
Port Wave Progress Estimation: geometric progress (origin->extreme->flipzone) + physics progress (similarity anchor + convexity adjustment) -> rawWaveProgress -> EMA smoothed
Port Belief Engine: 6 simultaneous beliefs (expansion, convexity, creation, absorption, retracement, demandReturn) each with position-weighted raw scores -> EMA smoothed
Port Hypothesis Engine: 6 hypotheses (LateExpansion, TerminalConvexity, CreationForming, AbsorptionActive, RetracementActive, DemandReturn) normalized to 0-100
Port Prediction Engine: predScore for each next phase weighted by wave progress/position/physics -> expectedNextPhase + probability
Port Validation Engine: track phase transitions, compute prediction accuracy over rolling windows
Port Adaptive Confidence Engine: modelConfidence with increase/decrease drivers + decay toward 50
Port Liquidation Wave overlay (Engine 1A.7): liqg_active/target/distPct/subPhase/objArrival/trueCHoCH logic that overlays on Induction phases
acceptance_criteria: Part4_EnergyFramework.mqh exists with valid MQL5 syntax
EDE correctly maps canonical phases to energy states 1-6
RE produces resolution state from dissipation progress + recursive completion
EAE computes attractor prices based on resolution state
All 6 beliefs are computed and EMA smoothed
Prediction engine forecasts next phase with probability
verification: Read the file and verify EDE/RE/EAE logic matches LETRA 37.txt ERF section
Verify belief engine formulas match LETRA 37 Section 12A
Verify hypothesis normalization uses fixed theoretical maxima (not rescale-to-100)
findings: Part4_EnergyFramework.mqh created at 923 lines. Contains: EnergyPersistState struct (for EMA state persistence across ticks), ComputePhysicsObservationLayer() (5 observation scores: Expansion, Decay, Curvature, Absorption, Liquidity - all 0-100), ComputeEnergyDissipation() (EDE: maps canonical phase to states 1-6, computes expansion/dissipated energy and progress), ComputeResolutionEngine() (RE: expectedCycles from waveDepth, completedCycles from entryCycle, resolutionState 0/1/2), ComputeEnergyAttractor() (EAE: attractor price from flipzone/origin based on resolution state, attractor score weighted by residual+resolution+distance), ComputeConvexityMaturity() (3 sub-scores: expWeakness, inductionMat, liqMat -> EMA smoothed), ComputeWaveProgress() (geometric 60% + physics 40% -> EMA smoothed), ComputeBeliefs() (6 beliefs: expansion/convexity/creation/absorption/retracement/demandReturn, all position-weighted and EMA smoothed), ComputeHypotheses() (6 hypotheses normalized against fixed maxima: 105/108/97/100/100/100), ComputePrediction() (6 candidate next-phases scored, highest picked with probability), ComputeValidation() (rolling 100-outcome buffer for prediction accuracy), ComputeAdaptiveConfidence() (increase/decrease drivers + decay toward 50), ComputeLiquidationWaveOverlay() (Engine 1A.7: arms on induction, distance compression, objective arrival with 3D agreement, trueCHoCH detection, absorption gate), UpdateEnergyFramework() (master orchestrator calling all sub-engines in order). Used simplified liqHeat=50 default and flipzone proximity for liqSweep since full heatmap runs in Part5. All brackets/braces/parens verified balanced. No duplicate names with Part1/Part2/Part3.
